name: plan-review
description: Automatic plan review plugin — validates plans against project directives and codebase structure after plan file creation. Dispatches Phase 1~5 each as an independent leaf in parallel (Team mode preferred, subagent 5x parallel fallback), with iterative deep re-review for false positive elimination. Phase 6 (Empirical Delegation) delegates plan data assumptions to debug-verify for live verification from the main session.
